title: Hierarchical Data Storage and Access Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the path from a user application request to the physical hard disk, showing the role of the operating system's mass storage management components.
relationships: Application makes a system call (e.g., read()) to the File System
File System translates logical file block to a logical disk block
Volume Manager maps logical block to a physical block (handling RAID, partitions)
Device Driver issues a command to the specific Disk Controller
Disk Controller performs the physical read/write operation on the disk sectors
